method: profile_for(stakeholder, edge) re-projects the derived corridor class, the substrate poles, and the edge inbound mechanism through each Atlas §8 persona. No new legal facts: every line is read from an existing record and every profile cites its backing tier1_legal records. Profiles are preview and inherit the verification status of the cells they read.

profiles.label: Stablecoin issuer (L1)
profiles.lens: May I issue, and will my token be admitted into the destination?

inbound_mechanism.detail: Unilateral Treasury comparability determination (on SCRC recommendation) + OCC registration + US-held reserves; none granted to date.
inbound_mechanism.administrator: US Treasury (Stablecoin Certification Review Committee) / OCC

profiles.headline: As an EU issuer, issuance is authorization-gated; entry into US is feasible pending a determination (Category II).

reading.implication: issuance is authorization-gated
reserve must be high-quality liquid assets
issuance is authorization-gated
foreign tokens admitted only via a determination / channel

inbound_mechanism.test: MiCA EMT authorization wall + Article 58(3) means-of-exchange cap
inbound_mechanism.detail: A non-EUR token faces enhanced reporting and, once significant and used as a means of exchange, the Article 58(3) ceiling (one million transactions/day or EUR 200m/day). A EUR sister EMT via a MiCA-authorized issuer avoids the cap.

profiles.label: Stablecoin issuer (L1)
profiles.lens: May I issue, and will my token be admitted into the destination?

inbound_mechanism.test: Japan Electronic Payment Instruments inbound channel-determination
inbound_mechanism.detail: Foreign token circulates only via a registered EPIESP holding reserves in Japan equal to customer holdings, with the foreign issuer not issuing/redeeming/soliciting to Japanese users (recognition + registration, not mutual recognition).

profiles.headline: As an US issuer, issuance is authorization-gated; entry into JP is feasible pending a determination (Category II).

reading.implication: issuance is authorization-gated
reserve must be high-quality liquid assets
